text: Welcome aboard, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Looking forward to working with you!
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Excited to have you on the team!
Welcome aboard, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Glad to have you in the community!
Welcome aboard, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be a great asset to the community!
